title: Craft Of The Wild (COTW)
description: Ever wanted to play Zelda BOTW in Minecraft? Well, now you can explore your Minecraft world while fighting BOTW mobs.

### **<font color="red">⚠️THIS PROJECT IS ON BETA⚠️</font>**


![inner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a34be4efa0d34d2a84c289e2d9358bed510d7bb.png)

</center>

### 📖 About 
Craft Of The Wild (COTW) is a mod that tries to integrate the Zelda Breath Of The Wild game seamlessly as possible to resenble vanilla Minecraft. We try to achieve this by not breaking the vanilla loop and looks but without removing the essence of the Zelda game. The mod is focused on adding some monsters, NPCs, structures, and items from the game to Minecraft in a way that they fit in.

<center>
  
![inner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a34be4efa0d34d2a84c289e2d9358bed510d7bb.png)

</center>

### ❓ FAQ 


- **Can you do a backport to version X?**  
They will be no backports. We will always just work on the recent version of Minecraft.

- **Will you add X feature?**   
Probably, please suggest it in the discord on the corresponding channel. For now, the mod is focused on adding some mobs and structures to Minecraft and give that BOTW vibe.

- **Will you try to add TOTK stuff?**   
Of course! I have some easter eggs in game right now that lean towards that topic.

- **When will be updating?**   
No ETA, I'm not a fan of deadlines.

- **Can I use this mod into my modpack?**  
Yes! Feel free to use Craft Of The Wild in your modpack. Just make sure to credit by provide a link back to this page.


<center>
  
![inner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a34be4efa0d34d2a84c289e2d9358bed510d7bb.png)
</center>
